title: epistemos.soul.v1
description: Per-model user-identity + preferences + agent-persona substrate. Source: deterministicapp.md §5 Hybrid MD+JSON memory. Stored as YAML/JSON frontmatter in soul.md alongside the agent's system instructions. Schema-validated writes flow through MutationEnvelope. Schema-rev migrations live in the schema_rev registry.

schema_rev.description: Canonical schema name + revision. NEVER mutate without migration registry update.

soul_id.description: 12-char lowercase-alphanumeric stable id; collision-resistant across machines.

model_id.description: The model this soul is bound to (e.g. 'qwen3-4b-4bit', 'claude-opus-4.6', 'apple-intelligence').

identity.description: User-authored identity block. Read by both humans and LLMs as system context.

name.description: How the user prefers to be addressed.

voice.description: Short paragraph capturing the user's preferred conversational voice (e.g. 'concise / no hedging / cites sources').

stance.description: Position on contentious topics or established preferences (e.g. 'prefer local-first / privacy-respecting').

preferences.description: User-mutable preferences read by routing + UI.

citation_required.description: When true, knowledge.qa_over_vault refuses to answer without at least one citation.

instructions.description: User-authored markdown instructions sourced from instructions.md or inline. LLM-readable; never LLM-mutable except via explicit user-confirmed write.

knowledge_profile.description: Compressed knowledge-profile context (vault summary, recurring themes). May be regenerated by NightBrain.companion_refresh.

updated_by.description: Who wrote this revision. Agent + NightBrain writes carry an explicit MutationEnvelope authorizing the change.
